name: Waving Hand Emoji
desc: A hand waving used for greetings or goodbyes.

name: Raised Back of Hand Emoji
desc: A raised hand showing the back side, often used for a stop gesture.

name: Hand with Fingers Splayed Emoji
desc: A hand held up with all five fingers spread apart.

name: Raised Hand Emoji
desc: A palm-forward raised hand used as a stop signal or high five.

name: Vulcan Salute Emoji
desc: A finger-splitting salute popularized by Star Trek.

name: Rightwards Hand Emoji
desc: A hand reaching out to the right, often used to offer a handshake.

name: Leftwards Hand Emoji
desc: A hand reaching out to the left side.

name: Palm Down Hand Emoji
desc: A hand with the palm facing downwards, indicating dropping or dismissive motion.

name: Palm Up Hand Emoji
desc: A hand with the palm facing upwards, used for beckoning or requesting.

name: OK Hand Emoji
desc: A gesture forming a circle with the thumb and index finger to show approval.

name: Pinched Fingers Emoji
desc: Often called the Italian hand gesture, used to emphasize a point or question.

name: Pinching Hand Emoji
desc: A hand showing a small gap between fingers to represent a tiny amount.

name: Victory Hand Emoji
desc: The V-sign gesture representing peace or victory.

name: Crossed Fingers Emoji
desc: Index and middle fingers crossed to wish for good luck.

name: Hand with Index Finger and Thumb Crossed Emoji
desc: The finger heart gesture or a sign representing money or snapping.

name: Love You Gesture Emoji
desc: The American Sign Language sign for I Love You.

name: Sign of the Horns Emoji
desc: A hand gesture with pinky and index fingers raised, used in rock music.

name: Call Me Hand Emoji
desc: A hand with the thumb and pinky extended to look like a phone.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Left Emoji
desc: A hand with the index finger pointing to the left.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Right Emoji
desc: A hand with the index finger pointing to the right.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Up Emoji
desc: The back of a hand with the index finger pointing upwards.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Down Emoji
desc: A hand pointing down, often used to refer to a link or message below.

name: Index Pointing Up Emoji
desc: A front-facing hand with the index finger pointing up.

name: Index Pointing at the Viewer Emoji
desc: A hand pointing directly forward at the person looking at it.

name: Thumbs Up Emoji
desc: The classic gesture of approval or agreement.

name: Thumbs Down Emoji
desc: A gesture showing disapproval or dislike.

name: Raised Fist Emoji
desc: A clenched fist held high, symbolizing solidarity or power.

name: Oncoming Fist Emoji
desc: A fist pointing forward, used for a punch or a fist bump.

name: Left-Facing Fist Emoji
desc: A fist facing to the left side.

name: Right-Facing Fist Emoji
desc: A fist facing to the right side.

name: Clapping Hands Emoji
desc: Two hands clapping to show applause or celebration.

name: Raising Hands Emoji
desc: Two hands raised in celebration or joy.

name: Heart Hands Emoji
desc: Two hands forming a heart shape to show love or support.

name: Open Hands Emoji
desc: Two open hands, representing openness or a hug.

name: Palms Up Together Emoji
desc: Two hands held side-by-side with palms facing up.

name: Handshake Emoji
desc: A gesture of agreement or greeting between two people.

name: Folded Hands Emoji
desc: Two hands pressed together, representing prayer or thank you.

name: Writing Hand Emoji
desc: A hand holding a pen or pencil as if writing.

name: Nail Polish Emoji
desc: A hand having its fingernails painted, used for beauty or sass.

name: Selfie Emoji
desc: An arm holding a phone to take a self-portrait.

name: Flexed Biceps Emoji
desc: An arm flexing its muscle to show strength or fitness.

name: Mechanical Arm Emoji

name: Middle Finger Emoji
desc: An offensive hand gesture used to show defiance.

name: Gloves Emoji
desc: A pair of gloves for keeping hands warm or protected.
